title: bidens aequisquama var. guanajuatensis
intro: Bidens aequisquama var. guanajuatensis is a plant species, commonly known as a type of marigold or beggar ticks, which belongs to the daisy family. The plant is reported to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, which contribute to its use in traditional medicine. The health benefits of Bidens aequisquama var. guanajuatensis include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, digestive issues, and skin conditions. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made through infusion or decoction of its leaves and flowers, which are said to provide relief from its medicinal properties.
